name: linkedin-post
description: Write a viral-worthy LinkedIn post from a topic, insight, or personal story that drives engagement, builds authority, and grows followers.
input_description: Topic, insight, personal story, or opinion to share, plus optional poster's industry and the action you want readers to take.
output_description: A single LinkedIn post (1300 characters or fewer) with a pattern-interrupt opening line, structured body with line breaks for scannability, value delivery, and an engagement-driving close.
